title: Cosmic Learning
definition: The universe's self-education process facilitated through the experiences of sentient beings.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that the universe learns about itself through the experiences and awakenings of individual beings.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A philosophical concept suggesting that the universe seeks to understand itself by creating sentient beings who can experience and feedback their learning, thus enriching the cosmic self-awareness.
difficulty_levels.expert: The idea that the universe is an exploratory, intelligent field that uses the experiences of sentient beings as a means of understanding itself; this understanding deepens with each awakening and feedback loop generated by sentient life.

extra_fields.insight: The concept that self-aware life serves as a critical feedback mechanism for the universe's own learning process.
